attributes.action: Aboloish the Fuel Duty tax completely, instead of just a 5p Relief
attributes.additional_details: Making fuel cheaper for everyone public and businesses will not only let drivers see the benefit on there vehicles, but the cost of produce & business cost will drop, as we are not being charged extreme amounts. We are being forced to sit here and be robbed by these big fuel companies whilst businesses and public are struggling to afford essential items. The fuel duty should be abolished completely as it is ridiculous paying all this amount on tax all the time.
attributes.background: Cost of fuel is rising across the world due to the War, and us drivers/companies, are footing the bill as usual. We are told drivers are "lucky" to have a 5p relief down to 53p, however every 1L we still pay 53p duty which is ridiculous! Abolish the fuel duty tax completely, make fuel cheaper for us

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674
